plugins.name: project-mining
plugins.description: Mine project histories for behavioral evidence. Search chat logs, git history, docs, and code for concrete examples of specific patterns, values, or skills.

plugins.name: mcp-authoring
plugins.description: Reference guidance for writing MCP tool descriptions, server instructions, parameter schemas, output schemas, and annotations that LLMs actually use well.

plugins.name: engineering-loop
plugins.description: Slim parallel-review and curated research agents for solo development. The parts of compound-engineering's workflow that actually compound for a single operator, without the team-scale scaffolding.
